steps.title: Translate '36% greater than 50'
steps.content:
When a number is 36% greater than 50, we multiply 50 by $(1 + 0.36)$:
$$k = 50(1 + 0.36) = 50(1.36)$$

steps.title: Find r using the condition k = 50r
steps.content:
We are told that $k = 50r$. Since $k = 50(1.36)$, we can substitute:
$$50(1.36) = 50r$$
Dividing both sides by 50 gives:
$$r = 1.36$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
